project_privacy_data_flows.description: User adds/removes pages from watchlist. Page titles sent to MediaWiki watch API with CSRF token.

flow_steps.details: User views and manages watched pages.

flow_steps.code: @FormUrlEncoded @POST(MW_API_PREFIX + "action=watch") suspend fun watchPost(@Field("title") title: String, @Field("token") token: String, @Field("unwatch") unwatch: Boolean?): WatchPostResponse
flow_steps.details: Page title and CSRF token sent to MediaWiki watch API to add or remove from watchlist.
User info fetched to verify login status and permissions for watchlist management.
Watchlist data processed and displayed with filter options (namespace, time period).
